description:
The image captures a serene living room bathed in natural light filtering through three windows adorned with white curtains. The walls, painted in pristine white, contrast beautifully with the wooden floor that adds a touch of warmth to the space.

In the center of the room, a gray couch invites relaxation. A red blanket is casually draped over it, adding a pop of color against the neutral tones. A coffee table stands guard in front of the couch, hosting an array of objects including a blue water bottle and a white cup, perhaps remnants of a quiet afternoon spent enjoying a good book.

To the right of the couch, a wooden side table holds a stack of books and another red blanket, suggesting cozy evenings spent reading by the window. The precise arrangement of these objects creates a harmonious balance in the room, making it appear both inviting and tranquil.
